examples: The national flower of Singapore is the Vanda Miss Joaquim.
The orchid vanda miss joaquim is singapore's national flower and occasionally this flower is displayed at the orchid garden.
What secret gremlin demanded of Vanda that she drank, each day, four bottles of cheap wine?
Vanda Pharmaceuticals said yesterday it is testing its melatonin-stimulating drug tasilmelteon in something called Non-24-Hour Sleep Wake Disorder.
